diffs.patch:
Index: bench-artifacts/core-api-read-write-ledger.md
===================================================================
--- bench-artifacts/core-api-read-write-ledger.md	
+++ bench-artifacts/core-api-read-write-ledger.md	
@@ -0,0 +1,148 @@
+# Core API Read/Write Ledger
+
+## src/index.ts
+- Public surface: Exports Hono class, Context, HonoRequest type, InferRequestType, InferResponseType, ClientRequestOptions types
+- Internal names noticed: Hono module, BlankEnv, BlankSchema, Env, Schema
+- Imports or neighbors: types, context, request, client
+- Plain-English summary: Main entry point that re-exports the Hono framework class and associated types for end-user consumption
+- Copy-safe detail: Module exports Hono class and types for Env, Context, HonoRequest, client inference types
+
+## src/types.ts
+- Public surface: Defines Env, Variables, BlankEnv, Handler, MiddlewareHandler, H, NotFoundHandler, ErrorHandler, HandlerInterface, MiddlewareHandlerInterface, OnHandlerInterface
+- Internal names noticed: RouterRoute, Input, HandlerResponse, ToSchema, MergeTypedResponse, MergeMiddlewareResponse, IfAnyThenEmptyObject, IsAny, JSONValue
+- Imports or neighbors: context, hono-base, utils/headers, utils/http-status, utils/types
+- Plain-English summary: Comprehensive type definitions for handlers, middleware, routes, and environment variables used throughout the framework
+- Copy-safe detail: Type-only module defining Extends Env, Handler interface shapes for 1-10 handler stacks
+
+## src/hono.ts
+- Public surface: Exports Hono class
+- Internal names noticed: HonoBase, BlankEnv, BlankSchema, Env, Schema, RegExpRouter, SmartRouter, TrieRouter, HonoOptions
+- Imports or neighbors: hono-base, router/reg-exp-router, router/smart-router, router/trie-router, types
+- Plain-English summary: Main Hono class that extends HonoBase and configures the router implementation
+- Copy-safe detail: Single-class module instantiating SmartRouter with fallback routes
+
+## src/hono-base.ts
+- Public surface: Provides get, post, put, delete, options, patch, all, on, use methods for route registration
+- Internal names noticed: HonoOptions, Router, Context, compose, Env, H, NotFoundHandler, ErrorHandler, COMPOSED_HANDLER, getPath, getPathNoStrict, mergePath
+- Imports or neighbors: compose, context, router, types, utils/constants, utils/url, request/constants
+- Plain-English summary: Base Hono class implementing route registration, request dispatching, and error/notFound handlers
+- Copy-safe detail: Implements routing via #addRoute, supports basePath, onError, notFound, mount, route composition
+
+## src/context.ts
+- Public surface: Context class with env, req, res, event, executionCtx, header, status, set, get, var, body, text, json, html, redirect, notFound methods
+- Internal names noticed: HonoRequest, Result, Env, NotFoundHandler, Input, RouterRoute, TypedResponse, ContentfulStatusCode, RedirectStatusCode, ResponseHeader, BaseMime, JsonValue, InvalidJSONValue, ExecutionContext, Renderer, Layout
+- Imports or neighbors: request, router, types, utils/headers, utils/html, utils/http-status, utils/mime, utils/types
+- Plain-English summary: Request-response lifecycle context providing access to env bindings, headers, response methods, and error handling
+- Copy-safe detail: Manages #rawRequest, #req, #var map, #status, #res, #preparedHeaders, #matchResult, #notFoundHandler state
+
+## src/request.ts
+- Public surface: HonoRequest class with raw, path, param, queries, header, parseBody, json, text, arrayBuffer, bytes, blob, formData, valid, url, method, matchedRoutes, routePath
+- Internal names noticed: HTTPException, GET_MATCH_RESULT, Result, Input, ValidationTargets, InputToDataByTarget, BodyData, ParseBodyOptions, parseBody, CustomHeader, RequestHeader, decodeURIComponent_, getQueryParam, getQueryParams, tryDecode
+- Imports or neighbors: http-exception, request/constants, types, utils/body, utils/url
+- Plain-English summary: Request wrapper providing parameter extraction, query parsing, body reading, header access, and path matching results
+- Copy-safe detail: Implements body caching via #cachedBody, validates via #validatedData, extracts #matchResult params
+
+## src/request/constants.ts
+- Public surface: Exports GET_MATCH_RESULT symbol
+- Internal names noticed: Symbol
+- Imports or neighbors: none
+- Plain-English summary: Single-symbols module exporting route matching access token
+- Copy-safe detail: One unique symbol enabling typed access to router match result
+
+## src/utils/body.ts
+- Public surface: Exports parseBody, BodyData, ParseBodyOptions
+- Internal names noticed: HonoRequest, BodyDataValueDot, BodyDataValueDotAll, SimplifyBodyData, BodyDataValueComponent, BodyDataValueObject, BodyDataValue, parseFormData, convertFormDataToBodyData, handleParsingAllValues, handleParsingNestedValues
+- Imports or neighbors: request
+- Plain-English summary: Parses request body from multipart/form-data and application/x-www-form-urlencoded formats
+- Copy-safe detail: Supports all/dot options for form field flattening and nested object construction
+
+## src/compose.ts
+- Public surface: Exports compose function for middleware composition
+- Internal names noticed: Env, ErrorHandler, Next, NotFoundHandler, Context, dispatch
+- Imports or neighbors: context, types
+- Plain-English schema for kofa-compose-like middleware stack
+- Plain-English summary: Composes middleware handlers into single dispatch function with error/fallback handling
+- Copy-safe detail: Tracks via #index for next call prevention, wraps handlers with error context assignment
+
+## src/http-exception.ts
+- Public surface: Exports HTTPException class
+- Internal names noticed: ContentfulStatusCode, HTTPExceptionOptions
+- Imports or neighbors: utils/http-status
+- Plain-English summary: Exception class for returning predefined HTTP responses on authentication or validation failure
+- Copy-safe detail: Constructor accepts status code (default 500), message, res, cause; getResponse returns Response or creates new
+
+## src/client/index.ts
+- Public surface: Exports hc, parseResponse, DetailedError, InferResponseType, InferRequestType, Fetch, ClientRequestOptions, ClientRequest, ClientResponse, ApplyGlobalResponse, PickResponseByStatusCode
+- Internal names noticed: client, utils, types
+- Imports or neighbors: client/client, client/utils, client/types
+- Plain-English summary: HTTP client module providing functionally typed request builder and res
